zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱运行
zh.content:
当前Solana价格报80.06，日内波动区间仅79.96至80.25，显示市场交投相对清淡。价格运行于20日均线80.76050下方，短期趋势略偏空，但跌幅有限，说明空头优势并不明显，行情仍以区间震荡整理为主。

技术指标方面，MACD为-0.30817270，位于零轴下方，反映短线动能仍然偏弱，市场缺乏明确反弹信号。由于RSI数据暂缺，无法进一步确认超买或超卖状态，因此应重点关注价格与均线关系及成交量变化，等待新的方向选择。

支撑方面，79.96附近为短线首要支撑，若失守则可能进一步考验79.50一带；上方阻力首先关注20日均线80.76附近，若有效突破并站稳，则有机会向81.20至81.50区域发起挑战，否则仍可能维持区间整理走势。

操作策略上，建议以顺势交易为主，激进投资者可关注支撑位附近企稳后的短线反弹机会，并严格设置止损；稳健投资者宜等待价格重新站稳20日均线且MACD出现拐头迹象后再考虑加仓，以降低震荡行情中的交易风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is currently trading around 80.06, showing a narrow consolidation phase after recent indecision. Price action remains compressed between 79.96 and 80.25, indicating market equilibrium and reduced volatility. The broader intraday structure leans slightly bearish as price holds just below the 20-day SMA at 80.76. This suggests sellers are marginally dominant, though no strong trend has emerged yet, keeping the market in a sideways-to-soft bias environment.

Momentum indicators reinforce the neutral-to-soft tone. The MACD remains in negative territory at -0.308, indicating lingering downside momentum, though the absence of a signal line value limits confirmation strength. RSI data is unavailable, but price behavior suggests neither overbought nor oversold conditions. The tight trading range implies declining volatility, often preceding a directional breakout or continuation of consolidation until fresh catalysts emerge.

Key levels remain clearly defined within the current structure. Immediate support sits at 79.96, aligning with the session low and acting as the first defense for buyers. Below that, psychological support near 79.50 may come into play. On the upside, resistance is observed at 80.25, followed by the 20-day SMA at 80.76. A decisive break above this moving average could open room toward 81.20 and higher levels.

Trading strategies favor range-bound approaches until a breakout confirms direction. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight stops below 79.80, targeting a move back toward 80.70 resistance. Alternatively, breakout traders should wait for a clean close above 80.80 to confirm bullish momentum before entering longs. Failure to hold 79.90 could trigger a retest of lower liquidity zones and increase downside pressure.
